name: WITR MU.AS.I.BRENTOIL
summary: Brand Industries Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides metal industry solutions for the infrastructure, energy, and security markets in Israel. The company offers range of products and services for power plants, specialized equipment, and power distribution elements; large-scale plants and infrastructure; and high-rise and complex buildings. It also designs and manufactures LPG and petrol pressure tanks, and pressurized air tanks; and tankers, aircraft refuelers, firefighting trucks, armored vehicles, and special purpose trailers, as well as provides site erection, installation, and logistical services. In addition, the company undertakes turnkey natural gas projects; large scale projects in the industrial, energy, and infrastructure related fields; and erects power plants, large steel structures, bridges, tanks, and pressure vessels. It serves industrial, energy, and security companies; and government agencies. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Yeruham, Israel.
